name: ExtensionNutritionOrder_Priority
title: R5: routine | urgent | asap | stat (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NutritionOrder.priority` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NutritionOrder.priority` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `NutritionOrder.priority` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NutritionOrder.priority` has a context of NutritionOrder based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `NutritionOrder`.
Element `NutritionOrder.priority` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `NutritionOrder.priority` has a context of NutritionOrder based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `NutritionOrder`.
Element `NutritionOrder.priority` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Indicates how quickly the Nutrition Order should be addressed with respect to other        requests.

binding.description: Identifies the level of importance to be assigned to actioning the request.
